text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
42 
MIGRAINE_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Migraine and other Chronic Headache End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for migraine and other chronic 
headache as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: MIGRAINE_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: MIGRAINE_MEDICARE 
TYPE:
